instructions: Type the PROCTOR script lines below, the way you would say them to a real candidate. The simulated candidate will respond automatically based on keywords in what you type.

triggers.reply: Hi, thank you. Nice to meet you.

keywords: send me a message via chat
triggers.reply: Okay, got it. I'll message you if I need anything.
Understood, I'll make sure to stay in view the whole time.
Noted, I'll be careful not to block the camera.

keywords: inform me whenever you are ready for your break
let me know if you need a break
triggers.reply: Sure, I'll let you know before I take a break.
Okay, reading it out loud now... done.
Thank you! I'm ready to start.
Yes, I understand the break policy.
No, I don't have any questions. I'm ready.
Sure, it's right here on the desk, powered off.
Okay, one moment, moving the camera around now.

keywords: front and back of your chair
triggers.reply: Sure, here's the front, back, and underneath of my chair.
Yes, here's the floor under my desk.

keywords: top, underside and underneath of your workspace
triggers.reply: Okay, here's my workspace, top and underneath.
Sure, here's my keyboard, top and bottom.
Here's my mouse and mousepad, both sides.
No, I'm not wearing any headphones or earbuds.
Sure, here are my glasses, front and back.

keywords: front and back of both your ears
triggers.reply: Okay, here are my ears, both sides.
Sure, here are my hands, front and back.
Okay, sleeves pulled up, nothing written on my arms.
Here you go, nothing written on them.
Sure, all my pockets are empty, see?
Thank you, resuming now.

keywords: make sure you exit the application
triggers.reply: Thank you, I'll exit the application now. Have a good day!
Oh, sorry about that. Let me disconnect it and log back in.

keywords: outside of an approved testing region
triggers.reply: Oh no, that's strange. What should I do next?
Hi, yes I can see your message. Chat is working on my end.
Sorry about that, let me try refreshing on my end.
Sorry, my connection dropped for a second, I'm back now.
